ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-08-2021 Continued To Mar-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu, via Zoom, counsel for Allan Self, Petitioner/Administrator.

The Court inquired as to why the Administrator has failed to file a a petition to close the Estate. Mr. Yu advises that a Petition is pending in the Court's e-filing queue. The preceding is confirmed by the Clerk.

The Status on Closing of Estate is continued to MAR-22-2021 in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods/Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Continued To Mar-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu appeared by zoom for Clyde Self.

Mr. Yu stated that his office sent the documents to his Client for review and that he needs a two-week continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to March 8, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-23-2020 Continued To Feb-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vincent Yu, Esq., counsel for Clyde Self, Administrator (appearing by video conference).

Mr. Yu reports that he has only just received the documents and materials necessary to close the estate, including waivers of accounting, and requests a continuance.

The Court continues the matter for status of close of the estate to February 1, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If the Petition for Final Distribution is filed one week prior to that date, the matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Continued To Apr-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner in Propria Persona Clyde Allan Self. Suzanne Self (daughter).

Clyde reported that his brother passed away December 2015, that his retirement did not list him as a beneficiary and the board is requesting letter of administration, that there is nothing in Richard's estate and that he paid for Richard's taxes in 2015. Suzanne reported that she made the corrections to the forms, that she tried to follow the notes provided by the examiner and that she has questions about the publication forms.

Court investigator Sandra Hilton stated that the Court can not provide legal advice, stated that NOLO press has information on how to probate and estate in California and that the California State bar has a referral service.

The Court continued the petition for letters of administration to April 5, 2017 at 9:00a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera and Nancy Wong. Court Investigator: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
